description_long: This sculpture features a stylized human head with a serene facial expression, emerging from a roughly textured base that resembles stone or marble. The most striking aspect is the crown of abstract, organic forms that radiate from the top and back of the head, resembling a cluster of hands, roots, or flowing hair. The forms are robust and rounded, merging into one another and creating a sense of movement and complexity. The surface is mottled with shades of greenish-blue and gray, giving it a weathered, patinated appearance typical of bronze or stone exposed to the elements. The base is irregular and appears to be a separate material, possibly simulating a marble plinth. The overall impression is both surreal and contemplative, blending human and natural motifs.
description: A stylized human head sculpture with abstract, organic forms radiating from the crown, finished in mottled greenish-blue and gray tones atop a rough, pale base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the calm human face and the full complexity of the organic forms radiating from the head.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlighting the layered, hand-like forms and the transition from the head to the abstract crown.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the clustered, rounded forms with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the merging of the organic forms and a partial side profile of the face.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human head with abstract organic forms
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
